name: Low-FAP/high-CXCL10 binary transcriptional fingerprint (24.4% of HGSOC)

source_receipts.anchor: FAP below and CXCL10 above their within-cohort means

verbatim_evidence.claim: FAP_z < 0 AND CXCL10_z > 0 (within-cohort z-scored per cohort to remove platform/batch effects)
Prognostic, not predictive; marks favorable-survival subgroup under heterogeneous SoC
